name: gecko-kamino-ts-sidecar
description: Thin TS sidecar: builds UNSIGNED Kamino klend deposit/withdraw txs via @kamino-finance/klend-sdk. Cluster-parameterized (devnet|mainnet). NEVER signs — Python signs+submits.
overridesComment: klend-sdk 8.0.2 declares farms-sdk ^3.2.24 but deep-requires .../@codegen/farms/programId, renamed to /programs in 3.2.25+. Pin 3.2.24 so the transitive require resolves. Remove when klend-sdk ships a fixed range.
